body:
APPROVE
The implementation satisfies the allow-list routing behavior and includes focused regression coverage for both the bad Gemini pick and the valid Gemini exact-pin path. I ran `go test ./...`; the routing package passed, while unrelated packages failed because this sandbox cannot open `httptest` listener ports.
